productDisplayName: Cabarelli Men Black Accessory Gift Set
description: Gift set - Wallet and Belt Wondering what to give that special someone as a gift? Your search is over with this classy combination! Sleek cabarelli wallet crafted from pure leather, slim enough to slip inside your jacket or hip pocket without spoiling the silhouette of your ensemble. Adds a quirky yet classy aesthetic into your sartorial choice for the day, when you snap this wallet out. A tonal Cabarelli belt comes with the purchase of this wallet. Now you don't have to worry about matching your different accessories as Cabarelli does the job for you. Wallet Dimensions: 10.5 cm x 8.5 cm Textured leather upper Two-fold wallet Two main compartments Four card holders on the left fold and a buttonable coin pocket on the right One slip pocket on either side of the fold Belt Length: 109 cm Textured jet black belt made of Italian leather Tang clasp Holes to customise Fit Care Wipe wallet and belt with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
